_comment: Template for users.json (gitignored - NEVER commit the real file). When users.json is absent or empty the app runs in OPEN/demo mode (operator picker, no login). Copy this file to users.json, create your admin, then manage everyone with admin-ops.html.

_fields.username: internal APP identity (letters, digits, . _ -) used for notes, @-mentions, sessions and the erpUsers bridge. Shown on records. NOT the sign-in credential.
_fields.displayName: shown in the header / rosters (optional; falls back to username)
_fields.email: REQUIRED + unique - the SIGN-IN key. Users log in with email + password, and SWIVEL L!NK federates on this same email. (A username also still works at login as a fallback.)
_fields.authProvider: local (password) | swivel (SWIVEL L!NK OAuth only, no local password) | both. Default local. A 'swivel' user needs no salt/pwdHash.
_fields.salt_pwdHash: set via admin-ops.html (password box). Manually: salt = 16 hex chars, pwdHash = SHA256('salt:password') hex. Leave both empty for a L!NK-only (swivel) user.
_fields.role: admin | manager | operator. admin+manager see every user in rosters and any teammate's worklist; operators only their own teams. The admin FLAG (below) gates admin-ops.html.
_fields.admin: true = may open admin-ops.html and manage users
_fields.teams: team tags; operators see only colleagues sharing at least one team (teammate lens, @-mentions, Assign roster)
_fields.stations: station codes this user works (must exist in ops.config stations[]). EMPTY = unrestricted (HQ view). The worklist and pre-arrival feed are limited to these.
_fields.primaryStation: the default station selected at login; must be one of stations[]
_fields.access: mode-bound pairs the user may handle, from: Air-Export, Air-Import, Sea-Export, Sea-Import. EMPTY = all four. Example below = air both ways plus sea export only.
_fields.erpUsers: THE LOGIN<->ERP BRIDGE: the ERP pic_user / created_by names this person owns (free text in the ERP, often different from the login - e.g. mandy owns 'leo' and 'corp'). 'My work' matches the WHOLE list. EMPTY = the login name itself. Staff turnover = re-point these tags in admin-ops.html, no ERP change.
